rows.label: qev085501_MSG0000
rows.name:
Ah, Colonel Elma, and everyone else!
You're here at just the right time![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085501_MSG0001
rows.name:
Gwin-san is making a face
like he has a favor to ask~~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085501_MSG0002
rows.name: Eeh, how did you figure it out?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085501_MSG0003
rows.name: You just have a somewhat longing look on your face mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085501_MSG0004
rows.name:
If you're hungry, Tatsu wouldn't mind
sharing a little bit of his snacks mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085501_MSG0005
rows.name: That's not it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085501_MSG0006
rows.name: If you have a worry in a place like this—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085501_JNK0010
rows.name: Deduce

rows.label: qev085501_SEL0011
rows.name: Point out that it's related to combat.

rows.label: qev085501_JNK0020
rows.name: Speculate

rows.label: qev085501_SEL0021
rows.name: Declare that it must be worries about love.

rows.label: qev085501_MSG0007
rows.name:
That's right.
The truth is, I want to become stronger.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085501_MSG0008
rows.name:
"That's right"—Wait,
there's no way that's it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085501_MSG0009
rows.name: I want to become stronger.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085501_MSG0010
rows.name: Gwin-san, aren't you strong enough already?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085501_MSG0011
rows.name:
More than this. Stronger.
I have to surpass him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085501_MSG0012
rows.name: Him?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085501_MSG0013
rows.name:
I see. So you want advice
on what you should do?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085501_MSG0014
rows.name: Yes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085501_MSG0015
rows.name:
First, unless I know your current abilities,
I cannot offer any advice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085501_MSG0016
rows.name: Let's have a mock battle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085501_MSG0017
rows.name: Eeh, there's no way I can win![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085501_MSG0018
rows.name:
Gwin-san.
What's important isn't winning or losing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085501_MSG0019
rows.name: Lin is right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085501_MSG0020
rows.name:
Yes, understood.
Please.[ST:wait ]
